# 1.2.1 / 2022-02-15

  * Security: Fixed potential timing attack vulnerability in verify function
  * Docs: Updated documentation for better security practices
  * Deps: Updated devDependencies to address security vulnerabilities

# 1.2.0 / 2021-04-03

  * Feature: Added support for custom key derivation functions
  * Perf: Optimized signature verification process
  * Test: Added comprehensive test suite for new features
  * Docs: Improved API documentation with security best practices

# 1.1.3 / 2020-07-21

  * Fix: Addressed potential signature validation bypass
  * Security: Improved timing attack resistance
  * Deps: Updated development dependencies

# 1.1.2 / 2019-10-12

  * Fix: Resolved compatibility issues with Node.js 12.x
  * Perf: Improved performance for high-volume signature operations
  * Test: Added Node.js 12.x to CI test matrix

# 1.1.1 / 2018-08-30

  * Fix: Addressed potential signature collision issue
  * Docs: Clarified usage examples in README
  * Test: Expanded test coverage

# 1.1.0 / 2017-11-24

  * Feature: Added unsign method with original value return
  * Perf: Optimized signature generation
  * Docs: Added TypeScript definitions
  * Test: Improved test coverage

# 1.0.6 / 2016-05-27

  * Fix: Improved error handling for invalid signatures
  * Security: Enhanced protection against timing attacks
  * Docs: Updated documentation with security recommendations

# 1.0.5 / 2015-09-13

  * Fix: Addressed compatibility issues with Node.js 4.x
  * Deps: Updated development dependencies
  * Test: Added Node.js 4.x to test matrix

# 1.0.4 / 2015-02-08

  * Fix: Resolved issue with signature validation in specific edge cases
  * Docs: Improved API documentation

# 1.0.3 / 2014-06-18

  * Fix: Addressed potential signature forgery vulnerability
  * Security: Improved HMAC implementation
  * Test: Added tests for security edge cases

# 1.0.2 / 2014-01-28

  * Fix: Resolved compatibility issues with Node.js 0.12
  * Perf: Minor performance optimizations

# 1.0.1 / 2013-08-12

  * Fix: Addressed issue with error handling
  * Docs: Improved documentation clarity
  * Test: Added additional test cases

# 1.0.0 / 2013-03-15

  * Initial stable release
  * Feature: Sign and verify methods for cookie values
  * Feature: HMAC-SHA256 based signatures
  * Docs: Comprehensive API documentation
  * Test: Complete test coverage
